subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Good to hear from you — glad we had the chance to connect at the conference, and a formal meeting sounds like a great next step.

Next week works well on our end. Please suggest a few 30-minute slots that suit you and we'll lock one in.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering — I'm not in a position to share internal contact information externally. If a senior technical conversation makes sense as things progress, we'll facilitate the right introductions through proper channels.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards,
Agent
company.internal
